name: Voice report training-fee narrative (synthetic)
evidence: I wanted to report this because I think I was scammed. The company name is Fake Identity. They said I was selected for a remote admin interview, then told me I had to pay a training fee of R6 000 before I could start. They wanted the money sent today by instant EFT and said the job would be cancelled if I waited.
notes: Synthetic regression for spoken scam-report intake: report intent, voice-style company extraction, rand-denominated training fee, and deadline pressure must survive the transcript-to-analysis path without needing audio in offline evals.
